name: Slush Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine boiling water and sugar in a large bowl, stirring until the sugar has completely dissolved.
2. Add pineapple juice, orange juice, and lemon juice to the mixture. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
3. Pour the mixture into a container or pitcher and cover with plastic wrap.
4. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours (or overnight) until thoroughly chilled and frozen.
5. About 2 hours before serving, remove from the refrigerator and add 2 cans of 7-Up and 1 bottle of Club Soda.
6. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
7. Serve over ice and enjoy!
